DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SOURCE_GROUP]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SOURCE_GROUP]
( 
	[LeadSourceGroupID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[SourceGroup] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SourceGroupDescription] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LeadWeight] [float]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadSourceGroupID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
